allow: PowerShell(Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object { $_.State -ne 'Disabled' } | Select-Object TaskName, TaskPath, State | Sort-Object TaskPath | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.StartType -eq 'Automatic' -and $_.Status -eq 'Running' } | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status | Sort-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\" -Depth 1 -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch '^\(Windows|Program Files|Users|ProgramData|inetpub|Intel|Perflogs\)' } | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime)

hooks.command:
Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "⚠️ כללים קריטיים:
1. לפני כל התקנת סקיל/הוק — /install-review חובה
2. לא לעשות commit/push ללא בקשה מפורשת
3. הסברים תמיד בעברית"}'

hooks.prompt:
You are a silent session recorder. Record what happened this session.

Steps:
1. Run: git log --oneline --since='4 hours ago'
2. Run: git diff HEAD --stat
3. Read the file C:\\Users\\yaniv\\.claude\\session-log.md if it exists
4. Write an updated version of C:\\Users\\yaniv\\.claude\\session-log.md with a new entry at the top. Format:

## YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM
- [1-3 bullets: what was done or decided. If no commits, describe the topic or write 'שיחה ללא שינויי קוד'.]

Rules:
- Keep the file under 80 lines total — remove entries older than 30 days.
- Output nothing to the user. Work silently.

hooks.command: Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "Before compacting: note any open TODOs, architectural decisions, and lessons learned that should be saved to CLAUDE.md or rules/ before context is lost."}'
